Sage Bot Item Code: E41
Moment of Triumph Engraving

Enhancement: 1
Once in a while the engraving owner
removes 1 / 2 / 3 / 4 / 5 / 6 / 7 negative effects from themselves and all allied units in a small radius around them, and removes 1 / 2 / 3 / 4 / 5 / 6 / 7 negative effects from all enemy units in the same area.

Enhancement: 2
3000 Damage from the gems
Once in a while the engraving owner removes 2 / 3 / 4 / 5 / 6 / 7 / 8 negative effects from themselves and all allied units in a large radius around them, and removes 2 / 3 / 4 / 5 / 6 / 7 / 8 negative effects from all enemy units in the same area.

Enhancement: 30
6000 Damage from the gems
Once in a while the engraving owner removes 3 / 4 / 5 / 6 / 7 / 8 / 9 negative effects from themselves and all allied units in a large radius around them, and removes 3 / 4 / 5 / 6 / 7 / 8 / 9 negative effects from all enemy units.
